next_steps: Perform urgent bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) for fungal, acid-fast bacilli, viral, and routine cultures
Send serum Cryptococcal antigen and urinary Histoplasma antigen
Obtain blood cultures for Histoplasma and mycobacteria
Stabilize hemodynamics with aggressive supportive care and continue current empiric antimicrobial coverage for PJP and bacterial pneumonia
Perform head CT or MRI to evaluate for intracranial lesions before lumbar puncture if neurological symptoms arise
Defer antiretroviral therapy initiation until opportunistic infections are identified and treated to mitigate the risk of IRIS
